title: 1. Distal Points
text:
Choose some distal acupoints based on your diagnosis, and insert the needles at the
chosen  points.  You  can  leave  the  needles  in  throughout  the  session  or  remove  them
immediately. If the patient gets nervous with needles lodged in the body while doing
acupuncture treatment on the face, you need to remove the needles.
I recommend using 1~3 distal points. The following are the most commonly used distal
points for cosmetic acupuncture. Each explanation belongs to a cosmetic acupuncture ﬁeld.
~ !  ~
70
ST-36
ST-36 is one of the most commonly used
acupuncture points and helps gastrointestinal issues.
SP-3
SP-3 helps gastrointestinal issues with stress.
SP-6
SP-6 helps menstrual and circulational issues.
LI-4
LI-4 is one of the most commonly used acupuncture
points for the face and head.
LV-3
LV-3 helps stagnation issues.
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
